code:
timeline
    title Instruction Execution Multi-Cycle Process
    
    section Cycle 1 IF
        Fetch : CPU reads instruction from memory
              : Program Counter points to instruction address
              : Instruction loaded into Instruction Register
    
    section Cycle 2 ID
        Decode : Control unit analyzes instruction opcode
               : Determine operation type and required operands
               : Read source registers if needed
    
    section Cycle 3 EX
        Execute : ALU performs the actual computation
                : Address calculation for memory operations
                : Branch condition evaluation
    
    section Cycle 4 MEM
        Memory : Read data from memory for LOAD instructions
               : Write data to memory for STORE instructions
               : Skip this phase for register-only operations
    
    section Cycle 5 WB
        Writeback : Store result in destination register
                  : Update processor flags if needed
                  : Prepare for next instruction

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个多周期指令执行的时间线，展示CPU从取指到写回的完整流程。我想分成五个阶段，每个cycle一个section，从IF到WB。
明白，五个section对应取指、译码、执行、访存、写回。每个section里面需要展开具体步骤吗？比如Fetch阶段要不要细化Program Counter和Instruction Register的操作？
对，每个阶段用冒号列出关键动作。IF阶段重点是CPU从memory读取instruction，同时记录PC指向的address。ID阶段control unit要analyze opcode，determine操作类型。
好的，我在Cycle 3 EX下面加了Execute节点，包含ALU computation、address calculation for memory operations，还有branch condition evaluation。这样execute阶段的核心操作都覆盖了。
MEM阶段要区分清楚：LOAD指令是从memory read data，STORE是write data到memory。另外register-only的操作要skip这个阶段，这个点容易漏。

已添加——LOAD对应read data from memory，STORE对应write data to memory，并且注明skip this phase for register-only operations。最后WB阶段我写了store result in destination register和update processor flags，还有prepare for next instruction。
ID阶段漏了一点——译码后如果需要操作数，要read source registers。还有IF阶段我确认一下，instruction loaded into Instruction Register这个表述要保留。
已修正，ID阶段现在包含read source registers if needed。整个时间线标题定为Instruction Execution Multi-Cycle Process，五个cycle从IF到WB完整呈现processor的instruction execution流程。
